description: Concise executive view of gross technical DB-port availability. The top row shows outcome and impact, charts show trend and priority, and the final table supports daily, weekly, or monthly reporting. Planned maintenance is not excluded.

panels.title: Avg Availability
panels.description: Average gross technical availability across the selected targets and time range. Planned maintenance is not excluded.

targets.rawSql:
WITH target_kpi AS (
  SELECT d.target_name, sum(d.up_probes)::numeric / nullif(sum(d.probes), 0) * 100 AS availability
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d
  WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
  GROUP BY d.target_name
)
SELECT coalesce(round(avg(availability), 2), 0) AS availability_pct FROM target_kpi;

panels.title: Targets Meeting SLA
panels.description: Percentage of selected targets whose availability meets the selected SLA threshold.

targets.rawSql:
WITH target_kpi AS (
  SELECT d.target_name, sum(d.up_probes)::numeric / nullif(sum(d.probes), 0) * 100 AS availability
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d
  WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
  GROUP BY d.target_name
)
SELECT coalesce(round(count(*) FILTER (WHERE availability >= ${sla:raw})::numeric / nullif(count(*), 0) * 100, 2), 0) AS sla_met_pct FROM target_kpi;

panels.title: Targets Below SLA
panels.description: Number of selected targets whose availability is below the selected SLA threshold.

targets.rawSql:
WITH target_kpi AS (
  SELECT d.target_name, sum(d.up_probes)::numeric / nullif(sum(d.probes), 0) * 100 AS availability
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d
  WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
  GROUP BY d.target_name
)
SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE availability < ${sla:raw})::bigint AS below_sla FROM target_kpi;

panels.title: Downtime (Target-Min)
panels.description: Total failed target-minutes. Two targets down for ten minutes equal twenty target-minutes.

panels.title: Downtime Incidents
panels.description: Number of downtime events that started in the selected time range.

panels.title: Avg Recovery Time
panels.description: Average duration of closed downtime events that started in the selected range. Open incidents are excluded.

panels.title: Availability vs Last Year
panels.description: Availability trend for the selected range compared with the same period one year earlier. Previous-year data appears only when retained history exists.

targets.rawSql:
WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT $__timeFrom()::date AS from_date, $__timeTo()::date AS to_date
), target_period AS (
  SELECT 'Current' AS metric, date_trunc('${grain:raw}', d.period_start::timestamptz) AS period_start, d.target_name, sum(d.up_probes)::numeric / nullif(sum(d.probes), 0) * 100 AS availability
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d CROSS JOIN bounds b
  WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN b.from_date AND b.to_date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
  GROUP BY 2, 3
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Previous Year', date_trunc('${grain:raw}', (d.period_start + interval '1 year')::timestamptz), d.target_name, sum(d.up_probes)::numeric / nullif(sum(d.probes), 0) * 100
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d CROSS JOIN bounds b
  WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN (b.from_date - interval '1 year')::date AND (b.to_date - interval '1 year')::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
  GROUP BY 2, 3
)
SELECT period_start AS "time", metric, round(avg(availability), 2)::double precision AS value
FROM target_period
GROUP BY period_start, metric
ORDER BY period_start, metric;

panels.title: Downtime by Period

targets.rawSql:
SELECT date_trunc('${grain:raw}', d.period_start::timestamptz) AS "time", 'Down Target-Minutes' AS metric, sum(d.down_probes)::double precision AS value
FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d
WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: Failed target-minutes grouped by the selected daily, weekly, or monthly reporting period.

panels.title: Availability by Env / DB Type

targets.rawSql:
WITH target_kpi AS (
  SELECT d.target_name, max(d.environment) AS environment, max(d.db_type) AS db_type, sum(d.up_probes)::numeric / nullif(sum(d.probes), 0) * 100 AS availability
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d
  WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
  GROUP BY d.target_name
)
SELECT now() AS "time", environment || ' / ' || db_type AS metric, round(avg(availability), 2)::double precision AS value
FROM target_kpi
GROUP BY environment, db_type
ORDER BY value ASC, metric;

panels.description: Average target availability by environment and database type; lowest groups appear first.

panels.title: Availability by Criticality

targets.rawSql:
WITH target_kpi AS (
  SELECT d.target_name, coalesce(max(d.criticality), 'unassigned') AS criticality, sum(d.up_probes)::numeric / nullif(sum(d.probes), 0) * 100 AS availability
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d
  WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
  GROUP BY d.target_name
)
SELECT now() AS "time", criticality AS metric, round(avg(availability), 2)::double precision AS value
FROM target_kpi
GROUP BY criticality
ORDER BY value ASC, metric;

panels.description: Average target availability by criticality; use this to identify business-impact concentration.

panels.title: Lowest Availability: 10 Targets

targets.rawSql:
WITH target_kpi AS (
  SELECT d.target_name, sum(d.up_probes)::numeric / nullif(sum(d.probes), 0) * 100 AS availability
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d
  WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
  GROUP BY d.target_name
), bottom_targets AS (
  SELECT target_name, availability FROM target_kpi ORDER BY availability ASC, target_name LIMIT 10
)
SELECT now() AS "time", target_name AS metric, round(availability, 2)::double precision AS value
FROM bottom_targets
ORDER BY value ASC, metric;

panels.description: Ten selected targets with the lowest availability in the reporting range.

panels.title: Period Summary
panels.description: Compact daily, weekly, or monthly report. Change Period and the dashboard time range to prepare the required reporting view.

targets.rawSql:
WITH target_period AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('${grain:raw}', d.period_start::timestamptz) AS period_start,
    d.target_name,
    sum(d.up_probes)::numeric / nullif(sum(d.probes), 0) * 100 AS availability,
    sum(d.down_probes)::bigint AS down_minutes,
    sum(d.latency_ms_sum) AS latency_ms_sum,
    sum(d.latency_ms_count)::bigint AS latency_ms_count
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d
  WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
  GROUP BY 1, 2
)
SELECT
  period_start,
  count(*)::bigint AS targets,
  round(avg(availability), 2) AS avg_availability_pct,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE availability >= ${sla:raw})::bigint AS targets_meeting_sla,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE availability < ${sla:raw})::bigint AS targets_below_sla,
  sum(down_minutes)::bigint AS down_target_minutes,
  round(sum(latency_ms_sum) / nullif(sum(latency_ms_count), 0), 2) AS avg_latency_ms
FROM target_period
GROUP BY period_start
ORDER BY period_start DESC;

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT environment AS __text, environment AS __value FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi WHERE period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date ORDER BY 1;
list.label: Environment
list.name: environment
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT environment AS __text, environment AS __value FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi WHERE period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date ORDER BY 1;

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT db_type AS __text, db_type AS __value FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi WHERE period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR environment = '$environment') ORDER BY 1;
list.label: DB Type
list.name: db_type
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT db_type AS __text, db_type AS __value FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi WHERE period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR environment = '$environment') ORDER BY 1;

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT target_name AS __text, target_name AS __value FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi WHERE period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR db_type = '$db_type') ORDER BY 1;
list.label: DB Name
list.name: target
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT target_name AS __text, target_name AS __value FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi WHERE period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR db_type = '$db_type') ORDER BY 1;

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT coalesce(criticality, 'unassigned') AS __text, coalesce(criticality, 'unassigned') AS __value FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi WHERE period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR target_name = '$target') ORDER BY 1;
list.label: Criticality
list.name: criticality
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT coalesce(criticality, 'unassigned') AS __text, coalesce(criticality, 'unassigned') AS __value FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi WHERE period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR target_name = '$target') ORDER BY 1;

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT coalesce(team, 'unassigned') AS __text, coalesce(team, 'unassigned') AS __value FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi WHERE period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') ORDER BY 1;
list.label: Team
list.name: team
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT coalesce(team, 'unassigned') AS __text, coalesce(team, 'unassigned') AS __value FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi WHERE period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') ORDER BY 1;

title: DB Port KPI Executive Summary - SQL
